description_long: This bungalow features a steeply pitched gable roof constructed from gray stone blocks, with prominent battlements along the roofline. The main structure is built from wooden planks, giving it a rustic, cabin-like appearance. The front facade is partially obscured by lush green shrubbery and supported by thick wooden posts, while the side and rear walls are lined with wooden fencing and additional greenery. The entryway is recessed beneath the roof, creating a sheltered porch area. Windows are small and symmetrically placed on the side walls, with wooden trim matching the rest of the structure. The building sits on a grassy plot with a visible dirt foundation, blending natural and constructed elements.
description: A rustic wooden bungalow with a steep stone gable roof, battlements, and lush greenery around its base. The structure features a sheltered porch and symmetrical small windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the steep gable roof, battlements, thick wooden posts, and dense greenery partially covering the facade.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the recessed porch entry, wooden fencing, and a small window, with greenery extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the wooden fencing, symmetrical window arrangement, and the full span of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the porch, side window, and greenery, with the roof's battlements and structure clearly visible.
